  path={"/api/programData/checkNewerVersions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



API to check if newer version available for list programIds and versionIds

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"programVersionList that you want to check newer version for","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"programId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"versionId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"}},"title":"ProgramIdAndVersionId"}}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns the Newer version status","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the User does not have access","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Internal error that prevented the retreival of newer version of program","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
